description: Improved end-to-end test infrastructure, CI stability, and reporting across multiple services and environments, with a focus on reliability, debuggability, and developer adoption.
highlights: Re-architected end-to-end test infrastructure and tooling to improve reliability, debuggability, and developer adoption across multiple services and environments
Identified and resolved systemic CI instability, isolating sources of flakiness and reducing intermittent test failures impacting delivery pipelines
Led migration from Cypress to Playwright, designing reusable fixtures and page object models that improved test maintainability and execution consistency
Developed custom TestRail integrations and reporting pipelines to aggregate results, surface trends, and enable data-driven quality decisions
Served as escalation point for complex test and CI issues, debugging failures across application code, test frameworks, and infrastructure layers
